title: Crossmark Global Holdings Inc. Grows Stock Holdings in VeriSign, Inc. $VRSN
summary: Crossmark Global Holdings Inc. significantly increased its stake in VeriSign, Inc. by 57.6% in the third quarter, holding 31,427 shares valued at $8.786 million. VeriSign sees high institutional ownership, with major firms like Vanguard and State Street holding substantial positions. Despite slightly missing EPS expectations, the company reported a 7.6% increase in revenue and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.81 per share.
